title: Guns, Gadgetery & Mission Editor
description: Guns and gadgets in both single-player and multiplayer. Mission Editor provided with the Game Master's Book.
body:
This datapack mainly adds the following features to Minecraft:

- Guns
- Gadgets
- New NPCs with guns
- Gun Shops
- Mission/Quest Editor
 
It's an utility freely inspired by level/scenario editors in RTS video games such as Age Of Empires, Empire Earth, Empires: Dawn of a Modern World... but also by [this mod from Jedi Knight 3: Jedi Academy](https://jkhub.org/files/file/2018-npcsp/)

**How this data pack has been designed:**
----

🕹 Singleplayer and multiplayer

🌏 To run on your own worlds or any free downloadable Minecraft worlds

📕 Use the Game Master's Book to edit Missions, summon NPCs who can shoot at you, change game options ...

Informations
----
⚠️ Please download the resource pack to correctly display the new items and entities.

<details>
<summary>⌨️ /give commands</summary>

⚠️​Your world must have [​Allow Commands] ON when it is created (= cheats enabled) for the commands below to work:

Give guns, ammo and gadgets command:

```
/function give:guns
/function give:ammo
/function give:gadgets
```






Game Master's Book command:

```
/function give:game_master_book
```

</details>



<details>
<summary>🖱️ Special Controls</summary>


Reload Gun

```
Press "Drop item" button
```

So, it is highly recommended to set the "drop" key to the “r” button.

Drop Item


```
Long press "Drop item" button
```

</details>





<details>
<summary>🎳 Installation/Uninstall tips</summary>



⚠️To ensure that this data pack works properly after installation, leave your map and return to it (or reload your server once).

⚠️A warning message about Experimental Settings appears when launching the map, this is perfectly normal, you can click on the [​I know what I'm doing!] button.

Command to uninstall this data pack:

```
/function guns:main/uninstall
```

</details>




**All Features:**
----

MULTIPLAYER COMPATIBLE

- Team selection with the Game Master's Book
- Assign yourself, other players and other mobs to a team to complete missions and activate the AI of new mobs. You can also leave a team.

MODERN GUNS

- From simple revolvers to heavy weapons
- Possibility of holding a handgun in each hand
- Scope for sniper rifle
- Explosive, smoke, tear-gas, remote-controlled grenades
- Localized damage on entities, headshots possible, blood splatters ON/OFF
- Game difficulty affects gun damage and mob shooting accuracy
- Armor protects against bullets, but alters at the same time
- Bullets collide with TNT, glass panes and metal doors
- Bullet gravitation

GADGETS
- Grappling Hook
- Jetboots
  - Fuel required
- Night Vision Goggles
  - Battery required
- Sonar Vision Goggles
  - Battery required
- Diving Helmet/Rebreather
- Slime arrows
- Tranquilizers
- Telescopic Scanner
  - Indicates the entity type
    - its team
    - its health points
    - its distance from your position
- Spy Garb
  - It lets you infiltrate your opponent's team
- Parachute
- Bandages

NEW MOBS
- Enemy spawners + BOSS
  - Custom mob skins or random armors with random patterns
    - Knight
    - Bandit
    - Robber
    - Burglar
  - Can use guns
  - Can throw grenades
- Allies Spawners on your team to protect you + HERO
  - Custom mob skins or random armors with random patterns
    - Knight
    - Cowboy
    - Police officer
    - Spec Ops
  - Shoot at the enemy
  - React to team killing
  - Can follow players who have the Rally Banner
- Special AI
  - Can open doors
  - Avoid sinking
  - Chase players over long distances
  - Success of the shot according to difficulty
- Customization+
  - Give the items and pieces of armor you want to the NPC you want to appear with what you have on you and in your offhand
  - Make spawn a tamed mount with a saddle. Humanoid mobs will mount it if they are close.


GAME MASTER'S BOOK
- Menu with clickable options
- Allows you to create missions
  - Kill the Boss
  - Elimination
  - Parkour
  - Steal
- Edit teams
- Give all spawn eggs of the mobs in this data pack
- Give all items of this data pack
- Place random loot boxes
- Place shops
- Options for modifying game rules
- Changes the world's game time
- Guide


All rights reserved
